Designwhere
Curating Dubai Design Week
1 of 4 · Welcome
This is a working prototype.

Built for Dubai Design Week — nothing here is a static picture. The map is real, the filters actually filter, and every flow connects to the next. Click around freely.

2 of 4 · Discover
Click any pin on the map.

A detail panel opens with what's inside that venue. Category and status filters in the toolbar narrow down what you see — try switching "Open now" off.

3 of 4 · RSVP, for real
Follow an RSVP through to a ticket.

Find an event with a spot left — Earthbound at Isola Space is a good one — and tap RSVP. Confirm it, view the ticket, and it lands in My Schedule automatically.

4 of 4 · Ask the concierge
Not sure where to start?

The AI Concierge builds a route from a single prompt. Tap one of its suggestion chips and watch the recommendations render as real, tappable places.

You can reopen this any time from the (i) in the corner.

A collective exhibition bringing together six regional studios exploring material memory and land — cast earth, salvaged stone, and woven fibre installations across Isola Space's main hall.
